name: Robb's Sun City Special
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the sausage, beef, and garlic. Drain well.
2. Grate the Velveeta cheese and add it to the meat mixture along with seasonings.
3. Stir until the cheese is melted.
4. Spread the mixture on slices of party rye.
5. Freeze on a tray and store in bags.
6. When ready to serve, broil for 3-5 minutes or until bubbly.
